put.description:
Updates or sets the avatar URL for the authenticated user. Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

get.description:
Retrieves preferences (e.g., language) for the authenticated user. Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

put.description:
Updates user preferences (e.g., language, preferred currency). Language must follow IETF standard (e.g., en-US). Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

patch.description:
Partially updates user preferences (e.g., language, preferred currency). All fields are optional. Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

get.description:
Fetches full details for a specific ad owned by the seller.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

404.description: Ad not found or not owned by the user. Possible status codes: AD_AD_NOT_FOUND

put.description:
Allows updating an INACTIVE or ACTIVE ad. If the ad is ACTIVE, the update must preserve all required fields (title, description, price, settlement currencies, location, stock > 0). Requires USER role authentication.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

parameters.name: adId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the ad to update

404.description: Ad not found for this user. Possible status codes: AD_AD_NOT_FOUND

400.description: Invalid update data or incomplete active ad. Possible status codes: AD_INVALID_AD_STATUS, AD_INVALID_AD_ID, AD_ACTIVE_AD_INCOMPLETE_UPDATE

403.description: Forbidden (e.g., using ARRR without PIRATE role). Possible status codes: AD_PIRATE_ROLE_REQUIRED

409.description: Concurrent modification detected. Possible status codes: AD_CONCURRENT_MODIFICATION

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

put.description:
Toggle pin status of a question. Only the ad owner (seller) can pin.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

400.description: Pin limit reached. Possible status codes: PIN_LIMIT_REACHED

403.description: Not the ad owner. Possible status codes: NOT_AD_OWNER

put.description:
Hide a question from public view. Only the ad owner (seller) can hide.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

403.description: Not the ad owner. Possible status codes: NOT_AD_OWNER

put.description:
Edit an existing answer. Only the answer author can edit.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

403.description: Not answer owner. Possible status codes: ANSWER_NOT_OWNER

post.description:
**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

parameters.name: adId
parameters.description: ID of the ad to add

parameters.name: adId
parameters.description: ID of the ad to remove

post.description:
Notifies the server that the user is still active. Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

Adds a new delivery address to the user's profile. Up to 50 addresses allowed. Requires USER role.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

400.description: Invalid request or maximum addresses reached. Possible status codes: USER_MAX_ADDRESSES_REACHED

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Creates a new support ticket with the given subject, category, and initial message body.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

201.description: Ticket created. Possible status codes: SUPPORT_TICKET_CREATED

post.description:
Adds a user reply to their own ticket. Automatically transitions AWAITING_USER tickets back to IN_PROGRESS.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

Creates an ad in an INACTIVE state. Requires USER role authentication.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Changes the status of an ACTIVE ad to INACTIVE. Requires USER role authentication.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

parameters.name: adId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the ad to deactivate

404.description: Ad not found for this user. Possible status codes: AD_AD_NOT_FOUND

400.description: Ad is already INACTIVE or invalid ID format. Possible status codes: AD_INVALID_AD_STATUS, AD_INVALID_AD_ID

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Changes the status of an INACTIVE ad to ACTIVE. Requires USER role authentication.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

parameters.name: adId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the ad to activate

404.description: Ad not found for this user. Possible status codes: AD_AD_NOT_FOUND

400.description: Ad is already ACTIVE or invalid ID format. Possible status codes: AD_INVALID_AD_STATUS, AD_INVALID_AD_ID

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Submit a report against a piece of content (ad, question, answer, message, or user) for violating platform guidelines. One report per user per target.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

200.description: Report submitted. Possible status codes: REPORT_SUBMITTED

404.description: Target not found. Possible status codes: REPORT_TARGET_NOT_FOUND

409.description: Already reported. Possible status codes: ALREADY_REPORTED

400.description: Reason not applicable for this target type. Possible status codes: REPORT_REASON_NOT_APPLICABLE

post.description:
Toggle upvote on a question. If already upvoted, removes the upvote.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

Submit an answer to a question. Automatically determines SELLER or COMMUNITY type based on ad ownership and purchase history.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

403.description: Not a previous buyer (for community answers). Possible status codes: ANSWER_NOT_PREVIOUS_BUYER

409.description: Seller already answered. Possible status codes: ANSWER_ALREADY_EXISTS

get.description:
Returns paginated answered Q&A pairs for an ad, with pinned items first. Public endpoint — enriched with author usernames and avatars.

**Security:** `Unsecured`

200.description: Page of answered questions with their answers

post.description:
Submit a question on an ad listing. The caller must not be the ad owner.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

403.description: Cannot ask on own ad. Possible status codes: QUESTION_OWN_AD

404.description: Ad not found. Possible status codes: QUESTION_AD_NOT_FOUND

429.description: Rate limited. Possible status codes: QUESTION_LIMIT_REACHED, QUESTION_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE

post.description:
This endpoint allows an authenticated user to make a purchase. It acts as a facade, coordinating between PurchaseService and PaymentService.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

400.description: Invalid purchase request. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_ADS_NOT_FOUND, PURCHASE_ADS_NOT_ACTIVE, PURCHASE_CANNOT_PURCHASE_FROM_SELF, PURCHASE_STOCK_INSUFFICIENT, PURCHASE_INVALID_PURCHASE_REQUEST, PURCHASE_DELIVERY_ADDRESS_COUNTRY_MISMATCH, PURCHASE_COUNTRY_OF_RESIDENCE_REQUIRED

404.description: Delivery address not found. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_DELIVERY_ADDRESS_NOT_FOUND

409.description: Price or currency does not match the actual Ad price. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_PRICE_MISMATCH

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Allows the buyer to cancel a purchase that is awaiting payment.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `USER`

400.description: Purchase cannot be cancelled in current state. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_INVALID_PURCHASE_REQUEST

403.description: User is not the buyer of this purchase. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_NOT_A_PARTICIPANT

404.description: Purchase not found. Possible status codes: PURCHASE_PURCHASE_NOT_FOUND

500.description: Internal server error. Possible status codes: INTERNAL_ERROR

post.description:
Sends some YEC coins to the specified address.

**Security:** `Unsecured`

200.description: Coins sent successfully. Possible status codes: SUCCESS

post.description:
Populates the database with a set of test users. If view keys are provided, a single 'playground_seller' user is created/updated.

**Security:** `Unsecured`

200.description: Users created successfully. Possible status codes: SUCCESS

post.description:
Populates the database with sample reports and support tickets in various statuses. Creates test users if needed. Idempotent — skips if support data already exists.

**Security:** `Unsecured`

200.description: Support data created successfully. Possible status codes: SUCCESS

post.description:
Populates sample questions and answers on recently created ads. Run 'createAds' first.

**Required Role:** `USER`

**Required Role:** `Authenticated User` (Default)

Checks if a username is already taken.

Checks if an email is already associated with an account.

**Security:** `Unsecured`

Logs out the current user by clearing the session.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `Authenticated User` (Default)

Authenticates a user and returns an authorization token. If the user is unverified, the response will indicate that verification is required.

200.description: Login successful or failed. Possible status codes: SUCCESS, AUTH_INCORRECT_CREDENTIALS

get.description:
Initializes the front-end session and returns requested data decorators.
            Each decorator adds specific fields to the root of the response object.
            
            Available decorators:
            * `accessToken`: Adds `accessToken` (String?) with the current JWT token.
            * `userProfile`: Adds `userProfile` (UserProfileDto?) with the user's profile details.
            * `preferredCurrency`: Adds `preferredCurrency` (String?) with the user's preferred currency (e.g., USD, PLN).
            * `countryOfResidence`: Adds `countryOfResidence` (String?) with the user's country of residence as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., US, PL). Null for guests or if not set.
            * `publicChatId`: Adds `publicChatId` (String?) with the hardcoded public chat ID.
            * `banStatus`: Adds `banned` (Boolean), `banReason` (String?), `bannedAt` (Long?), and `bannedUntil` (Long?) with ban details if the user is currently banned.
        

**Security:** `Unsecured`

parameters.name: decorators
parameters.description: List of decorators to include in the response

parameters.description: Radius in kilometers for geographic search (minimum 0.5km)

get.description:
Fetches a paginated list of users with optional search and filtering by status.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

Fetches detailed information about a user including profile, preferences, presence, and statistics.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

Fetches the full ban history for a user, including past and current bans.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

Fetches a paginated list of support tickets with optional filtering by status, priority, category, and assignee.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Returns dashboard statistics: open tickets, in-progress, awaiting user, resolved today, and average resolution time.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Fetches a paginated list of content reports with optional filtering by status, target type, reason, and assignee.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Fetches detailed information about a specific report including timeline, snapshot, and resolution details.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Returns dashboard statistics: open reports, in-review, resolved today, and total unresolved.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Fetches other reports for the same target content, useful for seeing the full picture of reports against a single item.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `SUPPORT`

Fetches the subcategories of a given category with admin-specific fields.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Depth of the tree to return. Default is 1.

get.description:
Searches categories by name, including hidden categories. Results include path information.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

delete.description:
Remove a question permanently. Admin/moderator only.

**Security:** `JWT (Bearer)`

**Required Role:** `ADMIN`

pirateViewKey.description: Optional PirateChain view key to register for the 'playground_seller' user

ycashViewKey.description: Optional YCash view key to register for the 'playground_seller' user

countryOfResidence.description: Country of residence as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., US, PL). Optional.

reason.description: Reason for banning the user (5–2000 characters)

bannedUntil.description: When the ban expires (epoch micros). Null means permanent ban.

CreateCategoryRequestDto.description: Request body for creating a new category

name.description: Category names by language tag (e.g., en-US → 'Electronics')

parentId.description: ID of the parent category (null for root categories)

PatchUserPreferencesRequestDto.description: Request DTO for partially updating user preferences. All fields are optional.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency (e.g., USD, EUR, ARRR). Optional.

countryOfResidence.description: Country of residence as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., US, PL). Optional.

UpdateCategoryRequestDto.description: Request body for updating a category

name.description: Updated category names by language tag

slug.description: Updated slugs by language tag (if not provided, slugs are auto-generated from name)

hidden.description: Whether to hide or show the category. Hiding cascades to all descendants.

acknowledge.description: Must be set to true to confirm hiding when active ads would be deactivated

ReorderCategoryRequestDto.description: Request body for reordering a category among its siblings

MoveCategoryRequestDto.description: Request body for moving a category to a new parent

newParentId.description: ID of the new parent category (null to move to root)

AdDiscoveryPreviewDto.description: Ad preview information with preferred currency price

UserSpaceDto.description: User public profile with their ads

SessionInitResponseDocumentationDto.description: Response for session initialization containing requested data decorators

accessToken.description: The JWT access token (included if 'accessToken' decorator is requested)

userProfile.description: The user profile (included if 'userProfile' decorator is requested)

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency (included if 'preferredCurrency' decorator is requested)

countryOfResidence.description: The user's country of residence as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (included if 'countryOfResidence' decorator is requested)

publicChatId.description: The public chat ID (included if 'publicChatId' decorator is requested)

banned.description: Whether the user is currently banned (included if 'banStatus' decorator is requested)

banReason.description: The reason for the ban (included if 'banStatus' decorator is requested and user is banned)

bannedAt.description: When the ban was issued, epoch micros (included if 'banStatus' decorator is requested and user is banned)

bannedUntil.description: When the ban expires, epoch micros, null if permanent (included if 'banStatus' decorator is requested and user is banned)

settlementCurrencies.description: Settlement currencies the user can accept for payments

referenceCurrencies.description: All currencies available as reference for pegged pricing

siblingCount.description: Number of reports for the same target

CurrencyDto.description: Represents a currency with its localized name and properties

code.description: The unique code of the currency

name.description: The localized name of the currency

type.description: The type of the currency (FIAT or CRYPTO)

decimalPlaces.description: The number of decimal places supported by this currency

type.description: Machine-readable slug representing the notification type

message.example: You have received a new order for 2x Widget.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created (epoch microseconds)

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the notification

NotificationListDto.description: Paged list of notifications for a user

hasMore.description: Whether more notifications are available for pagination

unreadCount.description: The total number of unread notifications for the user

NotificationListStatusResponseDto.description: Standard API response for notification list

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

data.description: The paged notifications and unread count

SuggestedAction.description: Represents a suggested action for the user to take when interacting with a notification

type.description: The type of action to perform

target.description: The target identifier for the action (e.g., an order ID or ad ID)

count.description: The total number of unread notifications

UnreadCountStatusResponseDto.description: Standard API response for unread notification count

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

AdDiscoveryDetailsDto.description: Detailed ad information with preferred currency price

otherAds.description: List of most recent other ads from the same user

watchersCount.description: Total number of users who have this ad in their watchlist

daily.description: Daily visit counts for the last 30 days (YYYY-MM-DD -> count)

monthly.description: Total unique visits for the current month

yearly.description: Total unique visits for the current year

CategoryTreeDto.description: Represents a category in a tree structure

slug.description: Slug of the category for URL use

children.description: List of subcategories. Only populated if requested by depth.

CategorySuggestionDto.description: Represents a suggested category with its full breadcrumb path

id.description: The ID of the selectable (leaf) category

path.description: The full breadcrumb path from root to this category

displayPath.description: A pre-formatted display string of the path (e.g., 'Electronics > Computers > Laptops')

AdminUserListItemDto.description: User summary for admin list view

bannedByUsername.description: Username of the admin who issued the ban

bannedAt.description: When the ban was issued (epoch micros)

bannedUntil.description: When the ban expires (epoch micros), null if permanent

unbannedByUsername.description: Username of the admin who lifted the ban

unbannedAt.description: When the ban was lifted (epoch micros)

active.description: Whether this ban is currently active

AdminUserDetailDto.description: Detailed user information for admin view

activeBan.description: Active ban details, if currently banned

awaitingUser.description: Number of tickets awaiting user reply

siblingCount.description: Number of reports for the same target

targetSnapshot.description: Snapshot of reported content at time of report

performedByUsername.description: Username of who performed the action

AdminCategoryNameDto.description: Category name and slug for a specific language

AdminCategoryTreeDto.description: Admin view of a category in the tree structure

parentId.description: ID of the parent category (null for root categories)

hidden.description: Whether this category is hidden from the public API

sourceType.description: Source type of the category (GPT or GML)

popularity.description: Number of active ads using this category

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in epoch microseconds

children.description: List of subcategories. Only populated if requested by depth.

AdminCategoryDetailDto.description: Detailed admin view of a single category

parentId.description: ID of the parent category (null for root categories)

hidden.description: Whether this category is hidden from the public API

sourceType.description: Source type of the category (GPT or GML)

sourceId.description: Source ID within the source system

adminOverride.description: Whether admin overrides have been applied to this category's name

deprecated.description: Whether this category has been deprecated by the source sync

popularity.description: Number of active ads using this category

path.description: Full path from root to this category

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in epoch microseconds
